'''Tanisuldees''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Dressellian/Legends|Dressellian]] who served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on [[Drongar/Legends|Drongar]]. He also was the field assistant of [[Filba]] the [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]].

==Appearances==
*''[[MedStar I: Battle Surgeons]]'' {{1st}}
